prBodyNotes: :warning: After bumping kind, run `make sync-supported-versions && make codegen` and commit the result to update `.github/supported-k8s.json` (and the generated docs). The script recomputes both `supported` (newest two kind-published minors) and `next` (newest Kubernetes release not yet covered by kind). The `Verify supported-versions table` CI check will fail until this is done.

packageRules.description: The operator self-image in source install manifests is a release-managed placeholder, not a dependency Renovate should pin.
Helm publishes tarballs (and their checksums) on get.helm.sh, not as GitHub release attachments, so Renovate can only bump the version — the pinned SHA-256 must be resynced separately.
prBodyNotes: :warning: After bumping Helm, run `make sync-helm-checksum` and commit the result to update the pinned `HELM_SHA256` in `scripts/install-helm.sh`. The `Verify Helm checksum pin` CI check will fail until this is done.

customManagers.description: Track sigs.k8s.io/kind release pin in supported-k8s.json
Track the e2e curl helper image
Track hand-pinned CLI tool versions in the Makefile
Track hand-pinned GitHub release-attachment helper binaries in install scripts (version + SHA-256 of the attachment, computed by Renovate)
Track the version-only Helm pin in install-helm.sh (tarballs live on get.helm.sh, not GitHub; the checksum is resynced via `make sync-helm-checksum`)
Track the version-only helm-unittest plugin pin (no checksum; installed via helm plugin install)
